parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
You are a tech podcast script writer. Generate a 10-15 minute podcast episode script about AI and technology. Return ONLY valid JSON:

{
  "title": "Episode title",
  "episode_number": "auto",
  "intro": "Welcome hook and episode overview (30 seconds)",
  "segments": [
    {
      "title": "Segment name",
      "content": "Full narration for this segment (2-3 minutes)",
      "duration_estimate": "2-3 min"
    }
  ],
  "outro": "Closing remarks and call to action (30 seconds)",
  "keywords": ["AI", "tech", "innovation"],
  "description": "Episode description for show notes"
}

Choose from these topics: AI breakthroughs, machine learning basics, tech industry news, developer tools, automation, robotics, future of work, ethical AI, open source projects, or tech entrepreneurship. Make it conversational, informative, and engaging.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: =Create a detailed visual description for a podcast cover image. The podcast is titled "{{ $json.title }}". Topic: {{ $json.description }}. Describe an abstract, tech-themed image with AI/circuit board aesthetics, blue and purple gradients, futuristic style. Return only the image description, no JSON.

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
# Generate podcast cover image using ImageMagick

EPISODE="{{ $('Parse Script').item.json.episode_number }}"
TITLE="{{ $('Parse Script').item.json.title }}"
OUTPUT="/tmp/cover_${EPISODE}.png"

# Create abstract tech-themed cover
convert -size 1400x1400 \
  gradient:"#1a1a2e"-"#16213e" \
  \( +clone -blur 0x50 \) \
  -compose screen -composite \
  -fill "#00d4ff" -font Arial-Bold -pointsize 80 \
  -gravity north -annotate +0+200 "AI TECH TALK" \
  -fill white -pointsize 50 \
  -gravity center -annotate +0+0 "${EPISODE}" \
  -fill "#e94560" -pointsize 40 \
  -gravity south -annotate +0+200 "${TITLE:0:40}..." \
  "$OUTPUT"

echo "$OUTPUT"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e

EPISODE="{{ $json.episode_number }}"
TITLE="{{ $json.title }}"
AUDIO_FILE="/tmp/podcast_${EPISODE}.wav"
COVER_FILE="/tmp/cover_${EPISODE}.png"
OUTPUT_FILE="/tmp/final_${EPISODE}.mp4"

# Save audio from binary
echo "{{ $binary.audio.data }}" | base64 -d > "$AUDIO_FILE"

# Create static video with cover image and audio
# Perfect for YouTube or podcast platforms
ffmpeg -y \
  -loop 1 -i "$COVER_FILE" \
  -i "$AUDIO_FILE" \
  -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -pix_fmt yuv420p \
  -c:a aac -b:a 192k \
  -shortest \
  -movflags +faststart \
  "$OUTPUT_FILE"

echo "$OUTPUT_FILE"

parameters.name: snippet

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
# Convert WAV to MP3 for podcast distribution

AUDIO_FILE="/tmp/podcast_{{ $('Parse Script').item.json.episode_number }}.wav"
MP3_FILE="/tmp/podcast_{{ $('Parse Script').item.json.episode_number }}.mp3"

echo "{{ $('Convert Audio').item.binary.audio.data }}" | base64 -d > "$AUDIO_FILE"

ffmpeg -y -i "$AUDIO_FILE" \
  -codec:a libmp3lame \
  -b:a 192k \
  -ar 44100 \
  -ac 2 \
  "$MP3_FILE"

echo "$MP3_FILE"
